calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,240p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,280p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,280p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73281694 --event evt-petition-disposition","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73281694 --event evt-petition-disposition && find data/cases/scotus/73281694 -maxdepth 6 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"wc -l -c data/cases/scotus/73281694/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml data/cases/scotus/73281694/record/snapshots/2026-07-17.json data/cases/scotus/73281694/record/documents/documents.json data/cases/scotus/73281694/record/documents/questions-presented.txt data/cases/scotus/73281694/record/documents/petition.txt data/cases/scotus/73281694/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt data/cases/scotus/73281694/record/context.json","workdir":"/home/r

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73281694/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml && sed -n '1,320p' data/cases/scotus/73281694/record/snapshots/2026-07-17.json && sed -n '1,120p' data/cases/scotus/73281694/record/documents/documents.json && sed -n '1,120p' data/cases/scotus/73281694/record/documents/questions-presented.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":22000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,500p' data/cases/scotus/73281694/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '501,1000p' data/cases/scotus/73281694/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,430p' data/cases/scotus/73281694/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '431,900p' data/cases/scotus/73281694/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt && sed -n '1,40p' data/cases/scotus/73281694/record/context.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)
const matches = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|citation|search.*court|legal/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description)); text(matches);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -n \"Modern discretionary-cert|Segment base rate by salience|relist|CVSG|originating circuit|Per-Term|Term\" metrics/statpack.md | head -80","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output)
const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,165p' metrics/statpack.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":22000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --era 2020s --citation '600 U.S. 122' --limit 8 --corpus-backend ranged","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":16000}); text(r.output)

const t = ALL_TOOLS.find(x=>x.name==="mcp__courtlistener__search"); if(!t){text("missing"); exit();} const r=await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"\"dormant Commerce Clause\" \"general jurisdiction\" registration",filed_after:"2023-06-27",filed_before:"2026-07-17",num_results:10,fields:["absolute_url","caseName","court_citation_string","dateFiled","citation","snippet"]}); for (const c of (r.content||[])) { if (c.type==="image") image(c); else if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); }

const r=await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"\"dormant Commerce Clause\" Mallory consent registration",filed_after:"2023-06-27",filed_before:"2026-07-17",num_results:20,fields:["absolute_url","caseName","court_citation_string","dateFiled","citation"]}); for (const c of (r.content||[])) { if (c.type==="image") image(c); else if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); }

const r=await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",case_name:"Tom James Company v. Zurich American Insurance Company",num_results:3,fields:["absolute_url","caseName","dateFiled","opinions"]}); for (const c of (r.content||[])) { if (c.type==="image") image(c); else if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); }

const r=await tools.mcp__courtlistener__get_endpoint_item({endpoint_id:"opinions",item_id:9897232,fields:["id","html_with_citations","plain_text"]}); for (const c of (r.content||[])) { if (c.type==="image") image(c); else if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); }

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"jq 'keys' metrics/statpack.json && jq '.scotus_cert_terms[] | select(.term == \"2025\")' metrics/statpack.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"jq '.sections | keys, .terms' metrics/statpack.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"jq '.sections[] | {name, title, scope}' metrics/statpack.json && jq '.terms | type, (if type==\"array\" then .[0:2] else keys end)' metrics/statpack.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json && sed -n '1,300p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ && git status --short","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"mkdir -p data/cases/scotus/73281694/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T134540Z","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":2000}); text(r.output)

const patch = "*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai/data/cases/scotus/73281694/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T134540Z/prediction.json
+{
+  "schema_version": "1.0",
+  "case_id": "scotus/73281694",
+  "event_id": "evt-petition-disposition",
+  "predictor_id": "codex-baseline",
+  "engine": "codex",
+  "model": "gpt-5.6-sol",
+  "run_id": "20260717T134540Z",
+  "created_at": "2026-07-1

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts validate data","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"git status --short && git diff --check && find data/cases/scotus/73281694/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T134540Z -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\\n' | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output)
